name: thinkaisolutions-platform
description: ThinkAiSolutions — multi-tenant WhatsApp Business Platform (direct Meta Cloud API Tech Provider): console + marketing site + API

scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n shared,server,client -c blue,green,magenta "npm -w @thinkai/shared run dev" "npm -w server run dev" "npm -w client run dev"
scripts.dev:server: npm run build:shared && npm -w server run dev
scripts.dev:client: npm run build:shared && npm -w client run dev
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm -w server run build && npm -w client run build && npm -w marketing run build
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm -w server run typecheck && npm -w client run typecheck && npm -w marketing run typecheck
